text:
Evangelion-VOX is an album consisting of songs from and based on the anime TV series Neon Genesis Evangelion and the film The End of Evangelion. It was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-382, it was released on 03 December 1997. http://vgmdb.net/album/35665 It was published outside Japan by Milan Records on 23 September 2022. https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/press-release/2022-09-24/available-digitally-for-the-first-time-outside-japan-evangelion-infinity-and-evangelion-vox/.190086 

The songs are R&B/hip-hop remakes of several pieces of background music from the Evangelion series. The album was produced by Shirō Sagisu. It peaked at number 10 on the Oricon albums chart, making six appearances.

The first edition of this CD was released in a circular metal case modelled after a film can, as pictured on the cover art of later editions.
